seed_problem: Themed grid network; remove at most k links to maximize the increase in s-t shortest path; checker verifies budget + connectivity and scores achieved delay.
mutation: composite: switch from edge-deletion to NODE-deletion interdiction (shutting a junction removes all its incident pipes) AND generalize the budget from a plain count k to a weighted knapsack budget K over per-node removal costs; maximize the s-t shortest path subject to staying connected.
title: Draining the Deluge: Reservoir Junction Interdiction
strategies: do-nothing baseline: shut no junction (achieves the original delivery time)
cost-greedy: repeatedly shut the cheapest affordable junction lying on the current shortest route while keeping s-t connected
best-improvement local search: at each step evaluate the true post-shutdown shortest route for every path junction and shut the one giving the largest delay per remaining budget
randomized multi-restart: perturb the greedy junction choices across seeds and keep the shutdown set that maximizes final delivery time
